title: pelargonium × eriosepalum
intro: Pelargonium × eriosepalum, also known as Mountain Geranium or Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the family Geraniaceae, derived from the cross-breeding of Pelargonium capitatum and Pelargonium cordifolium. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × eriosepalum include relieving digestive problems, reducing stress and anxiety, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide therapeutic benefits.
